dismissed.description: Filter by dismissed state. Omit to include both dismissed and non-dismissed issues.

kind.description: Only return issues from this check kind (e.g. 'sdk_outdated').

limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

severity.description: Only return issues with this severity. One of: 'critical', 'warning', 'info'.

status.description: Only return issues with this status. One of: 'active', 'resolved'.
